## Problem

What limitation or pain point are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature you want.

## Use case

Why does this matter for real use on a watch or receiver?

## Alternatives considered

List any workaround or alternative you already tried.

## Extra context

Add mockups, device details, or protocol notes if relevant.
